DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF MARY CHIRICHELLA'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANT TAKANO'S RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE, AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS. NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY ANY PARTY, COUNSEL, OR INTERESTED PERSON. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 30, 2023, AT 9AM IN DEPARTMENT 301. THE COURT NOTES THAT NEW DEFENSE COUNSEL WAS RECENTLY APPOINTED. NEW COUNSEL SHALL MEET AND CONFER WITH PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL BY OCTOBER 20, 2023, TO ADDRESS THE DEFICIENCIES IN THE RESPONSES. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL SHALL ADVISE JPT MCDONALD BY OCTOBER 25, 2023, WHICH ISSUES REMAIN FOR COURT RESOLUTION. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. CLERK: R. WOODS. NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

Motion To Compel Defendant Takano' Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One, And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-12-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF MARY CHIRICHELLA'S Motion To Compel Defendant Takano' Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One, And Request For Sanctions

Motion denied. The supplemental responses are sufficient. The Court reluctantly denies the request for sanctions. The Court recognizes there was a conflict with counsel, but Defendant's insurer should have taken further steps to promptly appoint new counsel to respond to the discovery at issue.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the courts ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312 (approval as to form) and must e-mail it to Judge Pro Tem David McDonald at davididaho14@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/JPT)
